evals.prompt: Create a simple landing page for Bull's new quantum computing service. It should have a hero section with headline, a features section with 3 cards, and a footer. Make it a single HTML file.
evals.expected_output: A complete HTML file using Bull brand colors (#FF5539 orange, #002870 blue), Tosh A for headlines, Roboto for body, proper logo placement, and brand-appropriate copy tone.

evals.prompt: Build an HTML presentation (single file, slide-based) for DataSentics introducing our AI consulting services to a potential enterprise client. About 5 slides.
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML presentation using Bull/DataSentics brand identity, correct DataSentics logo, brand colors, fonts, professional tone aligned with brand voice.

evals.prompt: Create a simple dashboard page showing Bull's HPC performance metrics. Include some charts/data visualization placeholders with proper brand styling. Single HTML file.
evals.expected_output: An HTML dashboard using Bull brand color palette including secondary colors for data viz (Sunbeam, Vitality, Sovereign), proper typography hierarchy, brand-consistent UI.
